steps.title: Identify the key clue
steps.content: The colon introduces evidence: cuttlefish “routinely demonstrated restraint by delaying gratification.” This directly shows they're successful at self-control, so the blank must mean skilled or capable.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Competent means skilled or capable—exactly what fits cuttlefish that successfully delayed gratification and exercised restraint. The other choices either contradict the evidence, describe unrelated qualities, or don't fit the sentence structure. That matches choice D — D is correct.
